name: edutempo
description: 智能乐团排练系统 - 实时协同标记 + 分声部音频提示 + 多端乐谱同步

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend && npm run build && cp -r dist ../dist
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.deploy:staging: cd backend-wrangler && wrangler deploy --env staging && cd ../frontend && wrangler pages deploy dist --env staging
scripts.deploy:prod: cd backend-wrangler && wrangler deploy && cd ../frontend && wrangler pages deploy dist
